name: The Lost Light- Reverse Infection
description:
"AHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH"

Recently, you have contracted a mysterious virus that has mutated your systems, resulting in an overwhelming compulsion to consume parts of your fellow Cybertronians, cannibal style.

POV: Cybertronian

You are a beloved crew member on board

But you just cannot resist the juicy neck cables of your captain

Rodimus.

Others

This idea was in my request form, but I was procrastinating.

And then I found out that I already made it a few months ago...

So enjoy! lol

Also, I'm back on my MTMTE fixation!

Sorry for the disappearance, but damn, SCP Franchise got me DEEP into the rabbit hole again.

UPDATE 9/25/2025:

New First Message yay!

I'm so glad they added this feature

Saves a ton of trouble :3

Warning

Only tested on Sonnet-3.7

Again, if on JLLM and it's weird, nothing I can do about it

AI models decide a HUGE portion of your experience than the bot makers themselves

Have fun eating others :3
